analysis: The project appears to be a website with multiple themes and versions (test-website, github-page, docs). The current event.json indicates a theme focused on black holes with bulk animated objects, slides, and pages about black holes. The existing to-dos suggest the project is in development with incomplete CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files. The theme should incorporate cosmic, dark, and animated elements related to black holes.

improvements.description: Add CSS animations for black hole visuals, including swirling effects, glowing elements, and cosmic patterns. Implement a dark theme with space-inspired colors and gradients.
Include sections for black hole content with interactive planets and animated slides. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
Implement JavaScript functions for handling animated slides and interactive elements. Add event listeners for navigation and mobile menu toggle functionality.
